reviews.comment:
Muy bueno es el servicio que te brindan los muchachos de la playa siempre atentos y con muy buena voluntad, además de tener lo esencial para el servicio de tu automotor, siendo socio te brindan auxilio mecánico, lugar para estacionar
La estrella menos es por el poco espacio que brinda el casco céntrico donde esta para esperar turno para cargar nafta

(Translated by Google)
The service provided by the guys at the gas station is excellent; they're always attentive and helpful. They have all the essentials for your vehicle, and as a member, they offer roadside assistance and parking. The one-star deduction is due to the limited space available in the city center where the station is located for waiting in line to fill up.
